discipline_note: Founder discipline (2026-07-21): do NOT repeat the hollow quantum-card mistake of taking an equation that looks quantum and calling it closed. 'oscillation is NOT yet quantum'. None of {i, psi, Hilbert space H, Born rule p=|psi|^2, tensor product (x), [A,B]=i*hbar, spin, particles, creation/annihilation, vacuum, coupling constants} may be a PREMISE anywhere below -- each is a DESTINATION that must grow from the retained root and pass its own gate. Every gate that claims closure ships BOTH a passing and a failing machine-derived control (see 'gates' section); a gate without both controls is a Type-U convention and MUST NOT be claimed closed.

rules.name: retained distinction (master root)
assumptions: a != b is retained (master core root, source_root/READOUT_GENESIS_CORE_SNAPSHOT.md)
rules.statement: a!=b is retained as a distinction; the distinction is asymmetric, giving an ordering direction. Identical to relativity's RB-P0 -- this is the one shared root, not a new axiom.
forbidden_claims: this is a physical quantum state
this asserts psi, a Hilbert space, or any complex structure

rules.name: ordered transitions and retention
rules.statement: The asymmetric ordering yields ordered transitions with a positive retention time tau_c>0.
forbidden_claims: tau_c is a measured physical relaxation/coherence time

rules.name: discrete ticks and finite causal graph
rules.statement: Retention discretizes into ticks t=n*Delta_theta; a finite causal graph is built on those ticks.
forbidden_claims: this is a physical lattice or discretized spacetime

rules.name: retained-distinction axioms FORCE the L_R operator form
rules.statement: The retained-distinction axioms FORCE the finite retention operator L_R's form -- not merely posit it. Machine-checked, axiom-free, re-compiled 2026-07-21 (coqc -q -R . DQG).
forbidden_claims: L_R is a physical Hamiltonian
this forces any complex/Hermitian structure on L_R

coq_backing.theorems: retained-distinction axioms force the L_R (Laplacian-shaped) operator form
coq_backing.note: Re-verified locally, axiom-grep clean (no Admitted/admit/Axiom/Parameter). See PROVENANCE_CAUSAL_QG.md.

rules.name: telegraph coarse-grain / spine PDE
rules.statement: Coarse-graining L_R over the ticks gives the spine second-order stepper M*d2 + D*d + K, shared verbatim with the relativity domain's RB-P2/RB-P3.
forbidden_claims: this is a physical wave equation of any named field theory

rules.name: spine characteristic equation / dispersion relation
rules.statement: The spine stepper's characteristic equation is M*s^2 + D*s + K*lambda = 0, exact-rational, parametrized by a mode label lambda.
forbidden_claims: lambda is a physical quantum number
s is a physical frequency

rules.name: oscillatory-regime split (spine dispersion)
rules.statement: lambda_c = D^2/(4*M*K). The discriminant disc(lambda) = D^2 - 4*M*K*lambda is negative (complex-conjugate root pair, oscillatory) for lambda>lambda_c, positive (overdamped) for lambda<lambda_c, and exactly zero at lambda=lambda_c (critical). Exact rational witness: M=D=K=1 -> lambda_c=1/4; lambda=1 gives disc=-3<0 (oscillatory); lambda=1/8 gives disc=1/2>0 (overdamped); lambda=lambda_c gives disc=0 (critical).
forbidden_claims: this oscillatory regime IS quantum mechanics
the complex-conjugate root pair here is psi or any quantum amplitude
'oscillatory' licenses the word 'quantum' by itself -- see DRIFT_CONTRACT.json oscillation!=quantum

rules.name: asymmetric-seed trifurcation R0 = Diag + SymOff + SkewOff
rules.statement: Any asymmetric seed matrix R0 decomposes uniquely as R0 = DiagPart + SymOff + SkewOff. Exact rational witness with a 3x3 R0 reproduces R0 exactly from the three parts; SkewOff is genuinely nonzero (torsion/circulation branch).
forbidden_claims: SkewOff is a physical spin or angular-momentum operator
this decomposition alone constructs a Hilbert space

coq_backing.theorems: R0 = DiagPart + SymOff + SkewOff, exact and unique
coq_backing.note: Re-verified locally, axiom-grep clean. See PROVENANCE_CAUSAL_QG.md.

rules.name: seed torsion is the skew-off part; group and rank-N structure
rules.statement: The seed torsion/circulation branch is exactly SkewOff; the set of admissible SkewOff parts forms a group and the construction extends to rank N, axiom-free.
forbidden_claims: this group is a physical gauge group
this is SU(2) or any named Lie group of quantum mechanics

coq_backing.theorems: torsion branch = SkewOff; group structure; rank-N extension
coq_backing.note: Re-verified locally, axiom-grep clean. See PROVENANCE_CAUSAL_QG.md.

rules.name: seed torsion genuine mixing
rules.statement: The torsion/circulation branch produces genuine (non-trivial, non-decomposable-further) mixing among retained components -- a finite, exact-rational witness with a nonzero SkewOff block.
forbidden_claims: this mixing is entanglement
this mixing is a superposition of quantum states

coq_backing.theorems: genuine (non-coboundary-reducible) mixing from the torsion branch
coq_backing.note: Re-verified locally, axiom-grep clean. See PROVENANCE_CAUSAL_QG.md.

rules.name: complexification gate (i as a readout, not a premise)
assumptions: a closed real oriented mode-pair exists
rules.statement: An orientation J on a closed real oriented mode-pair with J^2=-I and G-adjoint J^{dagger_G}=-J (G-skew under the positive retention metric G) EARNS the complex coordinate psi=u+J*v as a READOUT -- i is a consequence of a closed real structure, never a premise. Exact rational witness: J=[[0,-1],[1,0]], G=I2, J^2=-I2, J^T=-J. FAILING control: J_bad=I2 (identity) has J_bad^2=+I2 != -I2, and is correctly REFUSED the complex coordinate (NO_COMPLEX_QUANTUM_COORDINATE).
forbidden_claims: i, psi, or any complex structure is assumed as a premise anywhere upstream of this gate
this gate constructs a general/all-states complex psi (only the single closed-pair witness is established; see Q-X1)
this is a Hilbert space

rules.name: positive quantum norm
rules.statement: N_Q(psi) = <psi, G psi> is >= 0 for all psi and =0 iff psi=0, on the exact rational witness (G=I2, psi=(3,4) gives N_Q=25; psi=0 gives N_Q=0).
forbidden_claims: N_Q is proven positive-definite for ALL admissible states in general (only the one exact witness is established; see Q-X1/general-norm status)
N_Q is the Born probability

rules.name: reversible G-orthogonal evolution
rules.statement: An evolution operator U satisfying U^{dagger_G} G U = G preserves N_Q exactly. Exact witness: U=J (the complexification-gate orientation itself, reused as a rotation), N_Q(U*psi)=N_Q(psi)=25.
forbidden_claims: this establishes unitarity in general (only the one G-orthogonal witness is established)
U is a physical time-evolution Hamiltonian exponential

rules.name: memory-before-mass (formal algebra, Coq-green)
rules.statement: Retained memory (discrete algebra on the retention operator) FORCES a mass-like readout, axiom-free, machine-checked. This rule establishes the formal/algebraic claim only; whether this readout IS physical mass is a separate, explicitly YELLOW bridge (see Q-Y5). NOT counted as an independent node in the 32-node Quantum DAG closure audit -- it is the supporting formal citation folded into Q-Y5's yellow accounting (matching the verifier's own 'memory-before-mass' yellow-list item).
forbidden_claims: this readout is real physical mass or inertia (see Q-Y5 for the bounded bridge claim)
this derives E=mc^2 or any coupling constant

coq_backing.theorems: retained memory sequence forces a mass-like (inertial) readout, discrete algebra
coq_backing.note: Re-verified locally, axiom-grep clean. Formal claim only -- the physical semantic bridge is Q-Y5 (YELLOW). See PROVENANCE_CAUSAL_QG.md.

rules.name: discrete metric/curvature chain (folded from relativity, root-native)
rules.statement: The discrete connection U_{j<-i}=V_j^-1*V_i, the curvature certificate K_C=U_C-I (two finite transports failing to commute, nonzero exact witness), and the supporting discrete-geometry chain (metric-compatible curvature, 2nd Bianchi, Gauss-Bonnet, Riemann pair symmetry, rational SO(3) curvature) are folded in here from the relativity domain's OB-03/OB-04 as shared root-native structure, deduplicated (same underlying L_R operator, not re-derived).
forbidden_claims: this constructs a physical spacetime metric
this is sufficient for a quantum-gravity unification claim
this is re-derived independently of relativity/OB-03/OB-04 -- it is the SAME machine-checked witness, cited not duplicated

coq_backing.note: Same witnesses as relativity/OB-03/OB-04; folded here (not re-derived) because the underlying L_R operator is shared root structure. See PROVENANCE_CAUSAL_QG.md and ../relativity/PROVENANCE_CAUSAL_QG.md.

rules.name: QM/SR bounded algebraic identity (imported Minkowski caveat)
assumptions: relativity's InfoLorentzInvariance.box_quad (imported Minkowski signature, POSITED not forced)
rules.statement: InfoQuantumRelativityUnification.v (box_quad_is_spine_residual, spine_dispersion_iff_box_quad_vanishes) and InfoSeedFeedsQuantumRelativity_attempt.v compile axiom-free, BUT box_quad INHERITS the imported Minkowski signature from InfoLorentzInvariance.box_quad. This is therefore a bounded ALGEBRAIC IDENTITY between two independently-posited constructions, never a root-native derivation of QM/SR unification.
forbidden_claims: QM and SR are derived from one root
this is a root-native derivation of quantum mechanics or special relativity
this promotes Gamma_R, box_quad, or any Lorentz-shaped object to Th_coqc as a root derivation
this closes any node in group C (boundary/QG) as real physics

coq_backing.status: green compile, YELLOW claim tier (formal-closed / bridge-partial)
coq_backing.note: box_quad inherits InfoLorentzInvariance.box_quad's imported Minkowski signature -- the repo's own supplement/completeness-and-claims.md states this verbatim. See PROVENANCE_CAUSAL_QG.md 'REFUSED' section for the reasoning; cited here ONLY as a bounded algebraic identity.

rules.name: telegraph crossover discriminant (spine's own, not node-8 lapse)
rules.statement: InfoTelegraphHorizonUnification_attempt.v / InfoTelegraphCrossover_attempt.v prove disc_is_spine_discr, lam_c_is_spine_lambda_c, quantum_iff_above_horizon -- the spine's OWN classical/quantum crossover discriminant lambda_c=D^2/4MK, axiom-free. This is a real, machine-checked result, but the BRIDGE from 'above/below this discriminant threshold' to 'this regime IS quantum' is not established -- the theorem names a threshold, not a semantic identification.
forbidden_claims: quantum_iff_above_horizon licenses the claim 'this regime is real quantum mechanics'
this is the same object as relativity's node-8 observer-normalization/lapse (it is a DISTINCT crossover discriminant)
the threshold alone establishes psi, Born, or measurement

coq_backing.note: Re-verified locally, axiom-grep clean. See PROVENANCE_CAUSAL_QG.md.

rules.name: v^2=K/M conditional oscillator-parameter identification
rules.statement: Under the DECLARED (not derived) identification of the spine's own front-speed-squared with K/M, the oscillatory-regime split of Q-OS1 can be read as an oscillator-parameter statement. This identification is conditional and declared, exactly parallel to relativity's OC-01 (graph front-speed vs measured-speed) -- it is NOT derived from the root.
forbidden_claims: v^2=K/M is derived rather than declared
this identification licenses calling the oscillatory regime 'quantum'

rules.name: metric/curvature-to-quantum-regime bridge
rules.statement: Q-G1's discrete metric/curvature chain is root-native and Coq-green as GEOMETRY, but its bridge toward a quantum-regime interpretation (e.g. curvature as any kind of quantum-gravitational coupling) is not established -- naming it here only as a formal-closed / bridge-partial connective, matching relativity's own OB-01 caveat (operator-to-metric direction only, reverse forbidden).
forbidden_claims: curvature from Q-G1 is a quantum-gravity coupling constant
this bridges Q-G1 into any node of the quantum DAG beyond a named connective

rules.name: memory-before-mass physical/semantic bridge
rules.statement: Q-M1 establishes the FORMAL algebraic claim (retained memory forces a mass-like readout) as Coq-green. Whether that readout IS real physical mass/inertia is a DECLARED, not derived, correspondence -- exactly parallel to relativity's OC-02 (mass-memory declared correspondence).
forbidden_claims: mass is derived from retention
this is E=mc^2
this readout is empirically calibrated to any measured mass

rules.name: channel / CPTP formal card (bridge-from-root open)
assumptions: a formal completely-positive trace-preserving map card exists as a target definition
rules.statement: A formal CPTP (completely-positive, trace-preserving) channel CARD exists as a target definition (the abstract shape a quantum channel would need to satisfy), but the bridge FROM the root's own reversible G-orthogonal evolution (Q-N2) TO a general CPTP map (which must also cover irreversible/open-system dynamics) is OPEN -- not yet constructed or gated.
forbidden_claims: a CPTP channel has been derived or constructed from the root
this establishes measurement, decoherence, or any open-system dynamics
Q-N2's reversible evolution IS a special case of a root-derived CPTP map (the bridge itself is what's open)

rules.name: general root-derived complex psi (OPEN)
rules.statement: Q-C1 establishes complexification for ONE closed real oriented mode-pair, exact witness. General existence and uniqueness of a root-derived complex psi across all admissible retained states is OPEN.
forbidden_claims: a general complex state space has been derived from the root
this is a Hilbert space of arbitrary dimension

rules.name: quantum quotient q_Q (architecture, commuting-square NOT proven) (OPEN)
rules.statement: A candidate architecture for a quantum quotient q_Q (mirroring relativity's q_g / chem's q_D pattern) is sketched, but the commuting-square condition q_Q o F_full = F_Q o q_Q has NOT been proven or even witnessed on a finite fixture. This is the central open bottleneck for the whole domain.
forbidden_claims: q_Q has been constructed
any downstream node (composition, channel, measurement) has a proven commuting square through q_Q

rules.name: mixed-state from hidden lineage (OPEN)
rules.statement: Whether a mixed-state description (density-matrix-shaped object) arises from tracing out a hidden lineage of the retained-distinction root is OPEN -- no finite witness exists.
forbidden_claims: a density matrix has been derived from the root
purification/mixedness has been shown to be a readout of hidden lineage

rules.name: subsystem composition / (x)_kappa (OPEN)
assumptions: the no-free-copy law (root-level, not yet applied here)
rules.statement: Whether a composition operation (x)_kappa on retained subsystems, derived from the no-free-copy law, reproduces tensor-product-shaped behavior is OPEN. No finite witness exists; this is distinct from and does not assume any imported tensor product.
forbidden_claims: a tensor product has been derived
this establishes entanglement or any multi-partite structure

rules.name: measurement / Born-rule uniqueness (TARGET, OPEN)
rules.statement: TARGET, not established: uniqueness of the Born weight p=|psi|^2 across ALL admissible refinements. quantum_closure_v0_1.py section E is FINITE_DIAGNOSTIC evidence FOR the quadratic form only: on one exact refinement (25=9+16), the quadratic weight (p=2) is refinement-invariant while a linear weight (p=1) is not (5 != 7, correctly failing). This is evidence, not a uniqueness proof across all refinements/bases.
forbidden_claims: Born-rule uniqueness has been derived
p=|psi|^2 is established as THE measurement rule
the single-refinement finite diagnostic generalizes to all refinements without further work

rules.name: conditional update / measurement collapse (OPEN)
rules.statement: Whether a root-native conditional-update rule (projection-postulate-shaped) exists is OPEN -- no finite witness, no gate constructed.
forbidden_claims: a projection postulate or wavefunction collapse rule has been derived

rules.name: uncertainty relation (formal guard, boundary not root-derivation) (OPEN)
rules.statement: An RDL_Heisenberg-shaped formal guard exists and SURVIVED the hollow-card audit (it correctly refuses to fire on non-quantum inputs), but it is a boundary/consistency check, not a root-derivation of an uncertainty principle. Kept OPEN pending a root-native construction.
forbidden_claims: an uncertainty relation has been derived from the root
the surviving formal guard is equivalent to a proven Heisenberg bound

rules.name: correlation / CHSH / Tsirelson bound (formal guard, boundary not root-derivation) (OPEN)
rules.statement: A CHSH/Tsirelson-shaped formal guard exists as a boundary check (it can flag classical-vs-quantum-shaped correlation bounds), but it is not a root derivation of quantum correlation, entanglement, or the Tsirelson bound. Kept OPEN, depends on the still-open Q-X4 composition.
forbidden_claims: CHSH violation or the Tsirelson bound has been derived from the root
this establishes nonlocality or entanglement

rules.name: mass / particle layer (beyond formal memory-mass algebra) (OPEN)
rules.statement: A particle ontology (localized, countable excitations with mass) is OPEN -- Q-M1/Q-Y5 establish only a formal mass-like readout from memory algebra, declared not derived as physical mass.
forbidden_claims: particles have been derived from the root
this establishes a Fock space or particle number

rules.name: spin / spin-statistics (fully OPEN)
rules.statement: Spin and the spin-statistics theorem are fully OPEN. Q-S1's SkewOff torsion branch is NOT spin -- no rotation-group representation, half-integer quantization, or statistics connection has been constructed.
forbidden_claims: SkewOff or any torsion branch is spin
a spin-statistics connection has been derived
fermionic or bosonic exchange statistics have been derived

rules.name: QFT (needs q_Q + q_relativity + q_geometry joint) (OPEN)
assumptions: a geometry quotient q_geometry (not yet built)
rules.statement: A full QFT / effective-field-theory closure requires the JOINT construction of the quantum quotient q_Q, the relativity domain's quotient q_g, and a geometry quotient q_geometry -- none of which are individually complete, let alone jointly commuting. Fully OPEN.
forbidden_claims: QFT or any EFT has been derived from the root
coupling constants, creation/annihilation operators, or a vacuum state have been constructed

rules.name: superposition gate (conditional, fixed-operator-only) (OPEN beyond the narrow case)
rules.statement: A conditional superposition gate exists ONLY for a fixed, pre-specified pair of orthogonal readout operators on the single closed-pair witness of Q-C1 -- linear combinations of the two witness components stay in the closed pair and N_Q is additive on them (Pythagorean, exact rational). This is NOT a general superposition principle: it does not extend to arbitrary bases, arbitrary numbers of components, or non-fixed operators without further construction.
forbidden_claims: a general superposition principle has been derived
this licenses superposition across arbitrary/unfixed bases or operators
this is linear superposition of physical quantum states

gates.name: Oscillatory-regime split gate
gates.question: Does the spine dispersion split cleanly into oscillatory / overdamped / critical regimes as a function of lambda vs lambda_c=D^2/4MK?
gates.passing_control: lambda=1 > lambda_c=1/4: discriminant = D^2-4MK*lambda = -3 < 0 (complex-conjugate root pair, oscillatory).
gates.failing_control: lambda=1/8 < lambda_c=1/4: discriminant = 1/2 > 0 (real distinct roots, overdamped -- correctly does NOT read as oscillatory).

gates.name: Complexification gate
gates.question: Does a closed real oriented mode-pair earn the complex coordinate psi=u+J*v?
gates.passing_control: J=[[0,-1],[1,0]], G=I2: J^2=-I2 and J^{dagger_G}=J^T=-J (G-skew) -- EARNS the complex coordinate.

gates.name: Positive-norm gate
gates.question: Is N_Q(psi)=<psi,G psi> positive semi-definite with equality iff psi=0, on the retained state?
gates.failing_control: psi=(0,0): N_Q=0 -- correctly hits equality only at the zero state (not a false positive elsewhere).

gates.name: Reversible-evolution gate
gates.question: Does the candidate evolution operator U preserve the quantum norm exactly (G-orthogonality)?
gates.passing_control: U=J: U^{dagger_G} G U = G exactly (rational), N_Q(U*psi)=N_Q(psi)=25.
gates.failing_control: U'=[[1,1],[0,1]] (a shear, not G-orthogonal): U'^T G U' != G -- correctly REFUSED as a reversible evolution.

gates.name: Seed-trifurcation gate
gates.question: Does an asymmetric seed R0 decompose uniquely and exactly as Diag+SymOff+SkewOff?
gates.passing_control: 3x3 exact-rational R0 reconstructs exactly from Diag+SymOff+SkewOff (recon==R0).
gates.failing_control: Omitting SkewOff (reconstructing from Diag+SymOff alone) fails to reproduce the off-diagonal antisymmetric entries of R0 -- reconstruction != R0.

gates.name: Seed-torsion gate
gates.question: Is the seed torsion branch genuinely skew and nonzero (not a degenerate symmetric case)?
gates.passing_control: SkewOff of the asymmetric witness R0 is skew (T(SkewOff)=-SkewOff) and has at least one nonzero entry.
gates.failing_control: A symmetric seed (R0=R0^T) gives SkewOff=0 identically -- correctly reports NO torsion branch for a symmetric seed.

gates.name: Forced-L_R gate
gates.question: Do the retained-distinction axioms FORCE the L_R operator form, or merely admit it as one option among several?
gates.passing_control: InfoRetainedDistinctionForcesLaplacian_attempt.v: under the full retained-distinction axiom set, the L_R (Laplacian-shaped) form is the UNIQUE operator satisfying them (Coq theorem).
gates.failing_control: Dropping the retention-positivity axiom from the set admits non-L_R-shaped operators as also satisfying the weakened axioms (documented in the same Coq file's axiom-ablation lemmas) -- confirming the full axiom set, not a weaker one, is what forces uniqueness.

gates.name: Memory-before-mass gate (formal)
gates.question: Does a nonzero retained-memory sequence force a nonzero mass-like readout?
gates.passing_control: InfoMemoryBeforeMass.v: a nonzero retained-memory sequence forces a strictly positive mass-like readout (Coq theorem, discrete algebra).
gates.failing_control: A zero (no-memory) sequence forces the mass-like readout to be exactly zero -- correctly distinguishes memory-bearing from memory-free retained states.

gates.name: Metric/curvature-chain gate
gates.question: Do two finite transports along different paths fail to commute (nonzero discrete curvature)?
gates.passing_control: U_x=[[1,1],[0,1]], U_y=[[1,0],[1,1]]: loop transport U_C != I, curvature K_C=U_C-I != 0 (exact witness, folded from relativity/OB-04).
gates.failing_control: Two commuting transports (e.g. U_x=U_y=I2, or any pair with U_x*U_y=U_y*U_x and U_C=I) give K_C=0 -- correctly reports flat/no-curvature.

gates.name: Born-refinement-consistency gate
gates.question: Which candidate weight w_p(psi)~||P_i psi||^p is invariant under an exact refinement of a branch into exclusive sub-branches?
gates.passing_control: p=2 (quadratic): whole branch weight 25 equals refined sub-branch sum 9+16=25 -- refinement-invariant.
gates.failing_control: p=1 (linear): whole branch weight sqrt(25)=5 does NOT equal refined sum sqrt(9)+sqrt(16)=3+4=7 -- correctly fails refinement-invariance, REFUSED as a Born-weight candidate.
gates.note: Evidence FOR the quadratic form on ONE refinement, not a uniqueness proof across all refinements/bases -- stays a TARGET, uniqueness remains OPEN.

gates.name: CPTP / channel bridge gate
gates.question: Does the root's reversible G-orthogonal evolution (Q-N2) extend to a general completely-positive trace-preserving (open-system) channel?
gates.passing_control: NOT YET CONSTRUCTED -- no finite witness exists showing a root-derived map that is completely positive and trace-preserving beyond the reversible G-orthogonal case.
gates.failing_control: NOT YET CONSTRUCTED -- no finite witness exists showing a candidate map that correctly fails complete-positivity/trace-preservation as a control case.
gates.note: Formal CARD (target definition) exists; BOTH controls are TBD pending construction. Per the FAIL-ABLE gate law, this gate is explicitly NOT claimed closed -- it is recorded honestly as bridge-partial/open-controls, never silently promoted to green.

gates.name: Quantum-quotient q_Q gate
gates.question: Does a candidate quantum quotient q_Q satisfy the commuting-square condition q_Q o F_full = F_Q o q_Q on any finite fixture?
gates.passing_control: NOT YET CONSTRUCTED -- no finite fixture has been built or run.
gates.failing_control: NOT YET CONSTRUCTED -- no finite fixture has been built or run.
gates.note: Central open bottleneck. Honestly recorded as having NO controls yet -- this is the FAIL-ABLE gate law's explicit non-closure case, not a Type-U convention (a Type-U convention would be silently claiming closure without controls; this gate makes no closure claim at all).

gates.name: Composition / (x)_kappa gate
gates.question: Does a composition operation on retained subsystems, derived from the no-free-copy law, reproduce tensor-product-shaped behavior on any finite fixture?
gates.note: No controls yet -- open, not claimed closed.

gates.name: Measurement / Born-uniqueness gate
gates.question: Is p=|psi|^2 the UNIQUE weight consistent across ALL admissible refinements (not just the one QG-10 witness)?
gates.passing_control: NOT YET CONSTRUCTED beyond QG-10's single-refinement evidence.
gates.failing_control: NOT YET CONSTRUCTED beyond QG-10's single failing p=1 case.
gates.note: QG-10 gives finite-diagnostic evidence FOR p=2 on one refinement; QG-14 (uniqueness across ALL refinements) remains open with no general controls yet.
